h1.visual_description: Inferred as large, bold, blue text for chapter-level headings based on sub-heading style.

h2.visual_description: Medium-sized, bold, blue font, prefixed with a decimal section number.
h2.example_text: 1.5. Migrant Workers More at Risk of COVID-19 Infection

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption title; blue font with the label and number in bold.
Data source attribution; smaller, grey-colored text located directly below charts or figures.
Footnote text; small font size located at the bottom of the page below a horizontal separator line.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date parenthetical citations, e.g., (Hintermeier et al., 2020) or (The Straits Times, 2020; Ngui, 2020).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page footer containing the document title 'ASEAN Migration Outlook' on the left and the page number on the right, separated by a horizontal line.
